title: Oatzara Sour
description: A low-fat-friendly sour and dense one-pot Greek dish featuring oats pressure-cooked with a tangy yogurt sauce.

ingredients.name: ginger
ingredients.amount: a pinch (grated for zest, minced for flavoring, optional)

instructions: Combine oats and plain yogurt in a small saucepan. Add sour cream, lemon juice, and freshly grated ginger.
Bring to a boil over medium heat, then reduce heat and let simmer until the mixture thickens slightly (about 10 minutes).
Stir in dill for added freshness and garnish with extra dill before serving.
